html:
Petals are a Vegetable Food Item obtained by picking Flowers, including Roses, which are commonly found in Grassland Biomes. They restore 5 Sanity when picked and 1 Health point when eaten. Like other vegetables, they can be fed to Pigs to produce Manure. No variant of petals may be used in a Crock Pot, unless they have been dried.

Petals can be used to craft the Garland, a Headwear item which restores Sanity over time, the whirly fan which slows overheating when walking, the Pretty Parasol which offers a little bit of rain protection and Willow's Lighter. Gift Wraps are available to craft during the time of the Winter's Feast event.

Petals are also used to decorate Wendy's Sisturn to activate its +25/min aura, and increase the regeneration rate of Abigail's health pool.

Ghost Players have 50% of turning Petals into Evil Petals from haunting them.

Skill Tree (Wendy)

With Blessed Sisturn I skill, petals put inside the Sisturn will stay fresh for 50% longer.

With Blessed Sisturn II skill, if there is a Sisturn filled with Petals in the world, Wendy will have +25% resistance to mobs' negative sanity aura, and being near the Sisturn will give Wendy +40 sanity per minute (instead of +25 sanity per minute). This effect also extends some to other nearby players.

Dried Petals

Exclusive to:

Dried Petals are made from drying Petals on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Petal Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

–Wilson
“Stupid flowers. They're almost useless.”
–Willow

–Wolfgang

–Maxwell

–Wigfrid

“Evidence of flower violence.”
–Wortox
“Hee-hee, take that flowers!”
–Wurt
“Hope the bees aren't too mad at me.”
–Walter
“They wither away so quickly.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cánh hoa là một Vật phẩm Thực phẩm Thực vật thu được bằng cách hái Hoa, bao gồm cả Hoa hồng, thường được tìm thấy trong Quần xã Đồng cỏ. Chúng phục hồi 5 Tinh Thần khi được chọn và 1 điểm Máu khi ăn. Giống như các loại rau khác, chúng có thể được cho Lợn ăn để tạo ra Phân. Không thể sử dụng các loại cánh hoa khác nhau trong Nồi Hầm, trừ khi chúng đã được sấy khô.
